faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Peekskill?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal services in Peekskill typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground nests are generally less expensive to remove than those in high eaves, attics, or wall voids. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Peekskill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service throughout Peekskill and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Most wasp nest removals are completed in one visit lasting 30-60 minutes, though larger infestations or multiple nests may require additional treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Peekskill, NY?
faqs.answer: Peekskill residents commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests in yards and gardens, while paper wasps prefer eaves and porches. Hornets typically nest in trees or under roof overhangs, and all can become aggressive when defending their colonies.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize safety for your family and pets. We use targeted treatments and protective equipment to eliminate wasps while minimizing environmental impact. We advise keeping children and pets indoors during treatment and typically clear the area for normal use within 2-4 hours after service completion.
